@astryx.pagination.label.description: Aria label for the pagination navigation region.

@astryx.pagination.previous.description: Aria label for the previous-page button.

@astryx.pagination.next.description: Aria label for the next-page button.

@astryx.pagination.goToPage.description: Aria label for an individual page-number button. `page` is 1-based.

@astryx.pagination.pageIndicators.description: Aria label for the dots-variant page-indicator group.

@astryx.pagination.count.description: Visible range-of-total text for the count variant. `from`/`to` are 1-based item indices.

@astryx.pagination.pageOfTotal.description: Page-x-of-y text. Used as the visible compact-variant text and as the screen-reader announcement when total is known.

@astryx.pagination.pageAnnounce.description: Screen-reader announcement when a page changes and total is unknown.

@astryx.powersearch.editor.field.description: Label for the field selector in the PowerSearch filter editor popover.

@astryx.powersearch.editor.operator.description: Label for the operator selector in the PowerSearch filter editor popover.

@astryx.powersearch.editor.addFilter.description: Label for the button that appends a new filter row inside a group in the PowerSearch editor.

@astryx.powersearch.editor.removeFilter.description: Aria label for the icon button that removes a filter row from a group in the PowerSearch editor.

@astryx.powersearch.editor.groupOperator.description: Aria label for the AND/OR selector that combines sibling filters inside a group. Visible label is provided separately by the operator itself.

@astryx.powersearch.editor.group.description: Fallback label rendered where a nested group's operator would appear if no operator is available.

@astryx.powersearch.editor.delete.description: Label for the delete action inside the PowerSearch filter editor popover.

@astryx.powersearch.editor.cancel.description: Label for the cancel action inside the PowerSearch filter editor popover.

@astryx.powersearch.editor.apply.description: Label for the save/apply action inside the PowerSearch filter editor popover. Consumers can override via the `popoverSaveButtonLabel` prop.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.value.description: Label for the single-value input in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.values.description: Label for the multi-value input in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.time.description: Label for the time picker in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.date.description: Label for the absolute date picker in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.relative.description: Label for the relative-date selector (e.g. "Last 7 days") in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.startDat.description: Label for the start of a date range in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.endDate.description: Label for the end of a date range in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.entities.description: Label for the entity picker in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.searchPl.description: Placeholder shown in the typeahead / entity search input in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.enterVal.description: Placeholder shown in a free-text single-value input in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.addValue.description: Placeholder shown in the multi-value chip input in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.enterNum.description: Placeholder shown in a numeric input in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.selectVa.description: Placeholder shown in the enum-list selector in the PowerSearch value editor.

@astryx.powersearch.operator.notContains.description: PowerSearch string operator: negated substring match.

@astryx.powersearch.operator.notStartsWi.description: PowerSearch string operator: negated prefix match.

@astryx.powersearch.operator.notEndsWith.description: PowerSearch string operator: negated suffix match.

@astryx.powersearch.operator.is.description: PowerSearch equality operator (string, enum). May diverge from other equality operators (numbers, dates) at translation time.

@astryx.powersearch.operator.equals.description: PowerSearch numeric equality operator. Ships the same English text as `is` but is a distinct entry so number translators can diverge.

@astryx.powersearch.operator.greaterThan.description: PowerSearch numeric operator: strictly greater than.

@astryx.powersearch.operator.lessThan.description: PowerSearch numeric operator: strictly less than.

@astryx.powersearch.operator.greaterThan.defaultMessage: is greater than or equal to
@astryx.powersearch.operator.greaterThan.description: PowerSearch numeric operator: greater than or equal.

@astryx.powersearch.operator.lessThanOrE.defaultMessage: is less than or equal to
@astryx.powersearch.operator.lessThanOrE.description: PowerSearch numeric operator: less than or equal.

@astryx.powersearch.operator.between.description: PowerSearch date operator: within a range.

@astryx.powersearch.operator.isAnyOf.description: PowerSearch list operator: membership in the provided set.

@astryx.powersearch.operator.isNoneOf.description: PowerSearch list operator: exclusion from the provided set.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.itemsCou.description: Overflow summary shown by PowerSearch when a list-valued filter has too many items to fit on the token. Pluralized to match locale rules.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.entities.description: Overflow summary shown by PowerSearch when an entity-list-valued filter has too many entities to fit on the token.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.dateRang.description: Fallback text rendered by PowerSearch when a date-range filter value cannot be formatted concretely.

@astryx.powersearch.valueEditor.filtersC.description: Summary shown by PowerSearch for a nested-filter value: N filters.

@astryx.powersearch.resultCount.description: Result count shown next to the PowerSearch input. Announced to screen readers on change.
